market_pulse: OMNIA and Tiesto dominate top-tier awareness; Zouk gaining momentum as 'best club on Strip'; Palm Tree Beach Club emerging as high-profile day-venue alternative; LIV maintaining steady presence through user-generated content and John Summit mentions.

weekend_readiness.label: MODERATE
factors: Strong competitor DJ lineups (Tiesto, Diplo) already performed
Palm Tree Beach Club capitalizing on novelty/celebrity factor
Zouk positioning as dominant nightclub alternative
LIV maintaining steady brand presence but not driving viral moments
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Deploy talent announcement for Sunday/Monday; leverage guest-list/promo content to counter OMNIA's sustained momentum. Consider partnering with creator handles active this week to amplify weekend presence.

content_gaps.description: House/progressive house remixes dominating TikTok nightclub content; competitors using high-energy trending audio. LIV social absence from audio trend cycle.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Sync LIV stories/reels with trending house audio; feature DJ booth footage with trending beats to capture algorithmic lift on TikTok/IG.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA and Zouk actively featured in creator day-in-the-life and party-prep content. LIV not showing in influencer collaboration campaigns.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to @globeth0tter (active LIV reviewer on TikTok); coordinate behind-the-scenes/guest-list collab to refresh LIV presence in creator feeds.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Hakkasan posting countdown/flash-sale content driving FOMO. LIV not leveraging countdown format for weekend events.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch story countdown to Sunday/Monday events with time-limited promo (free entry before 11pm, VIP upgrade offers).

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest-list creator; high engagement (591 likes, 61 comments) driving awareness to younger demographic.
XS/Encore promoter with 176K followers; actively posting VIP access and table service content; strong reach into high-spend audience.
Promotional mentions of LIV, XS, OMNIA across platform. Regular nightclub content creator with visible audience engagement.
Vegas promoter posting comparative venue content; recently ranked OMNIA as top choice. Follows 300K+ audience.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Active LIV reviewer; high TikTok engagement; natural fit for guest-list partnerships
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Partner for Easter/Spring Break weekend content; offer behind-the-scenes access

liv_outreach_targets.reason: High-reach Vegas promoter; recently compared venues; influence over affluent party audience
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Invite for VIP night; encourage comparative post highlighting LIV advantages (exclusivity, tech, talent)
